calendar.matters:
Defendant Sherman Young'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT SHERMAN YOUNG'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

APPEARANCES: Cyndi K. Wong, Esq. of Law Offices of Cyndi K. Wong 626/240-0866 specially appearing for Michael Raifsnider, Esq. 398-9001 atty for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN LACK OF NOTICE OF THE PROCEEDINGS SUCH THAT RELIEF IS APPROPORIATE. CCP SECTION 473.5. In addition, the Court ruled that the service of summons is quashed. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Against Sherman Young; Declarations Of Attorney Roberto Ripamonti And Michael Raifsnider In Support
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -

DEFENDANT SHERMAN YOUNG'S Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Against Sherman Young; Declarations Of Attorney Roberto Ripamonti And Michael Raifsnider In Support IS CONTINUED TO 12/7/2010. PLAINTIFF PERSONALLY TO SERVE OPPOSITION ON DEFENDANT BY 11/23/10. DEFENDANT TO FILE REPLY BY 12/1/10. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797 (302/CWW)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-31-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Martin Eng was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Jason Young or Sherman Young.
Default was entered against defendant Jason Young on April 30, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Sherman Young on April 23, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Carmen Li was filed on June 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 6, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Martin Eng, and against the Defaulted Defendants Jason Young and Sherman Young as follows:

Damages/Principal - $200,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Reserved.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - Reserved.

Total - $200,000.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Continued To Oct-18-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Plaintiff Martin Eng was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Defendant Jason Young was present in pro per, but was not permitted to participate in today's hearing as his default was entered on April 30, 2010.
Default was entered against defendant Sherman Young on April 23, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Carmen Li was entered on June 1, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 6, 2010.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing due to the limited information and documentation plaintiff has provided to "prove-up" his case. Good cause appearing, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2010 Continued To Jul-19-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause to Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction. Appearances: Plaintiff Martin Eng, (415) 246-1111 appearing in Pro Per and moving party; Roberto Ripamonti, Esq. of Tsao-Wu, Show & Yee LLP (415) 777-1688 appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate that he is likely to prevail on the merits. The Temporary Restraining Order is dissolved. Premises to be immediately returned to Defendants. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jun-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Apr-08-2010 Continued To Apr-22-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause to Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction prohibiting access to leased property. Appearances: Plaintiff Martin Eng, appearing pro per; Roberto Ripamonti, Esq. appearing for Defendant and opposing party. Translator Bo Li translating for Defendant Jason Young who is also present. Hearing held and argued. The Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's Order to Show Cause hearing re: preliminary injunction is continued to April 22, 2010. Supplemental opposition is due April 16, 2010; Supplemental reply is due April 19, 2010, with courtesy copies to be sent directly to Department 302. Counsel will accept FAX notification re: Local Rule 8.3. Plaintiff's Temporary Restraining Order is extended to April 22, 2010 hearing date, pursuant to stipulation of counsel and court order. (Order signed re: TRO.)(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
